one_time_description: Prairies Economic Development Canada grant of $750,000 included in Other Revenue, non-recurring
economic_notes: Gambler First Nation has investments in Gambler Management Limited Partnership and Gambler Development Limited Partnership (equity method). Also holds interests in Gambler Resources LP, Gambler Gaming Ventures LP, Gambler Construction LP, Gambler Brandon Ventures LP, and Gambler Gas & Convenience Store LP. Gas & Convenience Store LP has loans guaranteed by First Nation totalling approx $3.8M. Brandon Ventures LP has a $1.8M guaranteed loan for land acquisition in Brandon, MB. Cultural centre under construction. Multiple CMHC housing phases under construction or recently completed.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Auditor is Lazer Grant Chartered Professional Accountants, Winnipeg MB. Consolidated entity includes 6 departments. Two limited partnerships accounted for by equity method (GBEs): Gambler Management LP and Gambler Development LP. Several other LPs (Gambler Resources, Gaming Ventures, Construction, Brandon Ventures, Gas & Convenience Store) are related parties but not consolidated. First Nation has significant contingent liabilities from loan guarantees totalling approx $5.6M for related LPs. Land settlement fund and advances from Crown-Indigenous Relations for land claim negotiations ongoing. Construction in progress of $2.15M including cultural centre and multiple CMHC housing phases. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided financial statements. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $6,134,840 + CMHC $114,081 + First Peoples Development Inc $34,323 + Province of Manitoba $52,499 = $6,335,743; osr = $7,744,785 - $6,335,743 = $1,409,042. Net financial debt is negative indicating net debt position of $2,253,506.
